![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/6665c1fbbeb97c362b008b34/b8e29fb9-c643-4457-8738-1694cde7f814/Screenshot+2024-06-09+at+11.24.55%E2%80%AFAM.jpg)

#### Welcome to 'Beats on the Lake,' where dance music meets the waters of Lake Lanier for a unique day of enjoyment. Set against the scenic backdrop of the lake, this event combines culture, music, art, and food in an extraordinary way. Throughout the day, and as the sun sets, the music intensifies with a specially curated selection of the SouthEast’s top DJs and live acts, creating an unforgettable evening. In addition to music - visit our art gallery featuring works from local artists or get a bite from one of our food trucks. 'Beats on the Lake' offers an immersive experience, blending dance culture with lake leisure for a day full of fun and amazing company.

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/6665c1fbbeb97c362b008b34/8c28c227-b505-486a-8b99-288dc0a895f6/Screenshot+2025-04-10+at+7.39.26%E2%80%AFPM.png)

### **The Dock + Boat Stage**

**Where the lake meets the beat.**

Our signature floating dancefloor returns! Set right on Lake Lanier, the Dock + Boat Stage delivers unforgettable views, a rolling breeze, and nonstop grooves from DJs spinning sun-drenched house, disco, and summer-ready sets. Whether you’re on the dock or dancing on the boat, this is the heart of the BOTL daytime experience.

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/6665c1fbbeb97c362b008b34/f0c2ee04-b046-4ce6-8f39-41dde5faedd2/Screenshot+2025-04-10+at+7.39.05%E2%80%AFPM.png)

### **The VIP Tent**

**Elevated vibes. Curated sounds. All-inclusive indulgence.**

Step into a fully decked-out oasis made for relaxing, recharging, and partying in style. VIP guests will enjoy:

- All-inclusive bar + catered food

- Exclusive DJ sets curated for a luxurious vibe

- Lounge areas with shaded couches and rest zones

- Private restrooms

It’s the perfect place to catch your breath—and catch a vibe—before diving back in.


![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/6665c1fbbeb97c362b008b34/cab0550f-981d-4e51-8fab-dc3f321b37ad/Screenshot+2025-04-10+at+7.38.11%E2%80%AFPM.jpg)

[BUY TICKETS](https://posh.vip/e/beats-on-the-lake-2025)

[BUY TICKETS](https://posh.vip/e/beats-on-the-lake-2025)

### **The Rock the Disco Airstream Stage**

**The main stage. The heartbeat. The late-night energy.**

Back and bigger than ever, the legendary Rock the Disco Airstream Stage anchors the BOTL experience. This is where the biggest sets go down—from golden hour into the deep of night. With booming PK sound, immersive lights, and a floor built for movement, this is where the magic happens when the sun sets and the crowd ignites.

![](https://images.squarespace-cdn.com/content/v1/6665c1fbbeb97c362b008b34/9abdaa47-745e-4173-ba42-3fd51a0f5687/Screenshot+2025-04-10+at+7.39.40%E2%80%AFPM.png)

### **The TOG Worldwide Stage**

**The future of ATL electronic is here.**

We’re proud to introduce this brand-new stage showcasing some of Atlanta’s most exciting up-and-coming DJs and producers. Brought to you in partnership with TOG Worldwide, this stage is all about fresh sounds, underground energy, and genre-bending sets that keep you guessing (and dancing).

#### Contact: mattsilliman@gmail.com
